briefdescription.para: The default point size.
The default software italic angle in radians.
The default behavior of whether atlas limitation is enabled in dali.
The default width of text-atlas-block.
The default height of text-atlas-block.
The default size(width, height) of text-atlas-block.
The maximum width of text-atlas-block.
The maximum height of text-atlas-block.
The maximum height of text-atlas-block.
Padding per edge. How much the block size (width, height) less than the text-atlas-block size (width, height).
The maximum block's size fit into text-atlas-block.
Factor multiply point-size in toolkit.
Return performance log threshold time in miliseconds for debug.
Whether performance log is enabled.
Retrieve a handle to the FontClient instance.

simplesect.para: A handle to the FontClient
A reference to the singleton instance of FontClient.

briefdescription.para: Create a handle to the new FontClient instance.

simplesect.para: A handle to the FontClient
All functions of this are not thread-safe, so create new handles for each worker thread to utilize them.

briefdescription.para: Create a handle to the new FontClient instance.

parameterdescription.para: The horizontal resolution in DPI.
The vertical resolution in DPI.

simplesect.para: A handle to the FontClient
All functions of this are not thread-safe, so create new handles for each worker thread to utilize them.

briefdescription.para: Create an uninitialized TextAbstraction handle.
Destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: This copy constructor is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the copied handle.

briefdescription.para: This assignment operator is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the copied handle.

simplesect.para: A reference to this.

briefdescription.para: This move constructor is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the moved handle.

briefdescription.para: This move assignment operator is required for (smart) pointer semantics.

parameterdescription.para: A reference to the moved handle.

simplesect.para: A reference to this.

briefdescription.para: Clear all caches in FontClient.
Clear caches in FontClient when Locale Changed.

simplesect.para: This function only clears caches that needs to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Set the DPI of the target window.

simplesect.para: Multiple windows are not currently supported.

parameterdescription.para: The horizontal resolution in DPI.
The vertical resolution in DPI.

briefdescription.para: Sets the DPI of the FontClient based on the current window's DPI.

simplesect.para: Multiple windows are not currently supported.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the DPI previously set to the target window.

simplesect.para: Multiple windows are not currently supported.

parameterdescription.para: The horizontal resolution in DPI.
The vertical resolution in DPI.

briefdescription.para: Called by Dali to retrieve the default font size for the platform.

detaileddescription.para:
This is an accessibility size, which is mapped to a UI Control specific point-size in stylesheets. For example if zero the smallest size, this could potentially map to TextLabel point-size 8.
The default font size.

briefdescription.para: Called when the user changes the system defaults.

simplesect.para: Previously cached system defaults are removed.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the list of default fonts supported by the system.

parameterdescription.para: A list of default font paths, family, width, weight and slant.

briefdescription.para: Initializes and caches default font from the system.
Retrieve the active default font from the system.

parameterdescription.para: font structure describing the default font.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the list of fonts supported by the system.

parameterdescription.para: A list of font paths, family, width, weight and slant.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the font description of a given font fontId.

parameterdescription.para: The font identifier.
The path, family & style (width, weight and slant) describing the font.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the font point size of a given font fontId.

parameterdescription.para: The font identifier.

simplesect.para: The point size in 26.6 fractional points.

briefdescription.para: Whether the given character is supported by the font.

parameterdescription.para: The id of the font.
The character.

simplesect.para: true if the character is supported by the font.

briefdescription.para: Find the default font for displaying a UTF-32 character.

detaileddescription.para: This is useful when localised strings are provided for multiple languages i.e. when a single default font does not work for all languages.

parameterdescription.para: The character for which a font is needed.
The point size in 26.6 fractional points; the default point size is 12*64.
true if a color font is preferred.

simplesect.para: A valid font identifier, or zero if the font does not exist.

memberdef.argsstring: (Character charcode, const FontDescription &preferredFontDescription, PointSize26Dot6 requestedPointSize=DEFAULT_POINT_SIZE, bool preferColor=false)
memberdef.name: FindFallbackFont

briefdescription.para: Find a fallback-font for displaying a UTF-32 character.

detaileddescription.para: This is useful when localised strings are provided for multiple languages i.e. when a single default font does not work for all languages.

parameterdescription.para: The character for which a font is needed.
Description of the preferred font which may not provide a glyph for charcode. The fallback-font will be the closest match to preferredFontDescription, which does support the required glyph.
The point size in 26.6 fractional points; the default point size is 12*64.
true if a color font is preferred.

simplesect.para: A valid font identifier, or zero if the font does not exist.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the unique identifier for a font.

parameterdescription.para: The path to a font file.
The point size in 26.6 fractional points; the default point size is 12*64.
The index of the font face (optional).

simplesect.para: A valid font identifier, or zero if the font does not exist.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FontDescription &preferredFontDescription, PointSize26Dot6 requestedPointSize=DEFAULT_POINT_SIZE, FaceIndex faceIndex=0, Property::Map *variationsMapPtr=nullptr)
memberdef.name: GetFontId

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a unique font identifier for a given description.

parameterdescription.para: Description of the preferred font. The font will be the closest match to preferredFontDescription.
The point size in 26.6 fractional points; the default point size is 12*64.
The index of the font face (optional).
The variations used in variable fonts (optional).

simplesect.para: A valid font identifier, or zero if no font is found.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a unique font identifier for a given bitmap font. If the font is not present, it will cache the given font, and give it a new font id.

parameterdescription.para: A bitmap font.

simplesect.para: A valid font identifier.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if a font is scalable.

parameterdescription.para: The path to a font file.

simplesect.para: true if scalable.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if a font is scalable.

simplesect.para: It the font style is not empty, it will be used instead the font weight and font slant slant.

parameterdescription.para: A font description.

simplesect.para: true if scalable

briefdescription.para: Get a list of sizes available for a fixed size font.

parameterdescription.para: The path to a font file.
A list of the available sizes, if no sizes available will return empty.

briefdescription.para: Get a list of sizes available for a fixed size font.

simplesect.para: It the font style is not empty, it will be used instead the font weight and font slant slant.

parameterdescription.para: A font description.
A list of the available sizes, if no sizes available will return empty.

briefdescription.para: Whether the font has Italic style.

parameterdescription.para: The font identifier.

simplesect.para: true if the font has italic style.

briefdescription.para: Query the metrics for a font.

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font for the required glyph.
The font metrics.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the glyph index for a UTF-32 character code.

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font for the required glyph.
The UTF-32 character code.

simplesect.para: The glyph index, or zero if the character code is undefined.

briefdescription.para: Return the glyph index of a given character code as modified by the variation selector.

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font for the required glyph.
The UTF-32 character code.
The UTF-32 character code point of the variation selector.

simplesect.para: The glyph index, or zero if the character code is undefined.

memberdef.argsstring: (GlyphInfo *array, uint32_t size, GlyphType type, bool horizontal=true)
memberdef.name: GetGlyphMetrics

briefdescription.para: Retrieve the metrics for a series of glyphs.

parameterdescription.para: An array of glyph-info structures with initialized FontId & GlyphIndex values. It may contain the advance and an offset set into the bearing from the shaping tool. On return, the glyph's size value will be initialized. The bearing value will be updated by adding the font's glyph bearing to the one set by the shaping tool.
The size of the array.
The type of glyphs used for rendering; either bitmaps or vectors.
True for horizontal layouts (set to false for vertical layouting).

simplesect.para: true if all of the requested metrics were found.

memberdef.argsstring: (FontId fontId, GlyphIndex glyphIndex, bool isItalicRequired, bool isBoldRequired, GlyphBufferData &data, int outlineWidth)
memberdef.name: CreateBitmap

briefdescription.para: Create a bitmap representation of a glyph.

simplesect.para: The caller is responsible for deallocating the bitmap data data.buffer using delete[].

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font.
The index of a glyph within the specified font.
Whether the glyph requires italic style.
Whether the glyph requires bold style.
The bitmap data.
The width of the glyph outline in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Create a bitmap representation of a glyph.

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font.
The index of a glyph within the specified font.
The width of the glyph outline in pixels.

simplesect.para: A valid PixelData, or an empty handle if the glyph could not be rendered.

memberdef.argsstring: (FontId fontId, GlyphIndex glyphIndex, VectorBlob *&blob, unsigned int &blobLength, unsigned int &nominalWidth, unsigned int &nominalHeight)
memberdef.name: CreateVectorBlob

briefdescription.para: Create a vector representation of a glyph.

simplesect.para: This feature requires highp shader support and is not available on all platforms

parameterdescription.para: The identifier of the font.
The index of a glyph within the specified font.
A blob of data; this is owned by FontClient and should be copied by the caller of CreateVectorData().
The length of the blob data, or zero if the blob creation failed.
The width of the blob.
The height of the blob.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the ellipsis glyph for a requested point size.

parameterdescription.para: The requested point size.

simplesect.para: The ellipsis glyph.

briefdescription.para: Whether the given glyph glyphIndex is a color glyph.

parameterdescription.para: The font id.
The glyph index.

simplesect.para: true if the glyph is a color one.

briefdescription.para: Whether the given glyph font is a color.

parameterdescription.para: The font id.

simplesect.para: true if the font is a color one.

briefdescription.para: Add custom fonts directory.

parameterdescription.para: to the fonts directory

simplesect.para: true if the fonts can be added.

briefdescription.para: Gets the custom fonts directories.

simplesect.para: list of the custom font paths.

briefdescription.para: Signal emitted when a custom font directory is successfully added.

detaileddescription.para: The signal signature is: void CustomFontAddedSignal(const std::string& path)

simplesect.para: The signal to connect to.

briefdescription.para: Creates and stores an embedded item and it's metrics.

detaileddescription.para: If in the description there is a non empty url, it calls Dali::LoadImageFromFile() internally. If in the description there is a url and width or height are zero it stores the default size. Otherwise the image is resized. If the url in the description is empty it stores the size.

description
The description of the embedded item.
pixelFormat
The pixel format of the image.
return The index within the vector of embedded items.

briefdescription.para: true to enable Atlas-Limitation.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration.

parameterdescription.para: The on/off value to enable/disable Atlas-Limitation.

briefdescription.para: Check Atlas-Limitation is enabled or disabled.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return true if Atlas-Limitation is enabled, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: retrieve the maximum allowed width and height for text-atlas-block.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return the maximum width and height of text-atlas-block.

briefdescription.para: retrieve the default width and height for text-atlas-block.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return the default width and height of text-atlas-block.

briefdescription.para: retrieve the current maximum width and height for text-atlas-block.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return the current maximum width and height of text-atlas-block.

briefdescription.para: set the achieved size (width and height) for text-atlas-block. If currentMaximumBlockSizeFitInAtlas larger than the current maximum text atlas then store, otherwise ignore.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return true if the current maximum text atlas size is changed, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: retrieve the number of points to scale-up one unit of point-size.

simplesect.para: Used default configuration. return the number of points per one unit of point-size

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used by FontClient::Get().

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to the internal fontClient object.

briefdescription.para: FontClient provides access to font information and resources.

detaileddescription.para: A "system font" is described by a "path" to a font file on the native filesystem, along with a "family" and "style". For example on the Ubuntu system a "Regular" style font from the "Ubuntu Mono" family can be accessed from "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/ubuntu-font-family/UbuntuMono-R.ttf".
